property.name: ERROR_MESSAGE
property.expression: ${"No record found with the specified quoteId: " + vars.quoteId}

property.name: ERROR_DETAIL
property.expression: ${"No record found with the specified quoteId: " + vars.quoteId}

variable.name: errorMsg
variable.expression: ${'Error occurred in billing-payment-sapi for quoteId- ' + vars.quoteId + ' errorMessage- ' + properties.synapse.ERROR_MESSAGE + ' errorDetail- ' + properties.synapse.ERROR_DETAIL + ' errorCode- ' + string(properties.synapse.ERROR_CODE)}
